_about: YAM visualizer configuration. Safe rule for editing: change values, keep key names the same unless you also update the Python code. Keys starting with '_' are human-readable notes and are ignored by the current code.

_editing_guide.asset_paths: Point to source files used by the visualizer, such as the hero GIF, fallback image, and hero mask files.
_editing_guide.timing: Controls how fast the screen redraws, how often the hero frame advances, and how quickly ivy updates.
_editing_guide.layout: Controls where the hero and info panel sit on the screen, and how much space they reserve around themselves.
_editing_guide.ivy: Controls growth behavior, direction bias, collision handling, and ornament generation.
_editing_guide.panel: Controls the small info panel shown in the scene.
_editing_guide.warning: If something looks wrong, first check file paths, then mask settings, then layout offsets.

chafa._about: Hero image rendering settings. This group controls how the source GIF is converted into ANSI/text frames.

timing._about: Animation/update speeds. Higher render_fps redraws the terminal more often. hero_fps changes hero frames. ivy_tick_seconds controls how often ivy logic advances.

layout._about: Screen placement and reserved-space rules for the hero and info panel. This also contains hero mask settings and older trim-based fallback controls.

ivy._about: Ivy growth, movement bias, collision pressure, and ornament generation. If ivy feels too aggressive or too timid, this is the main section to tune.

debug._about: Temporary troubleshooting switches for inspecting growth output.

panel._about: Small info panel settings. This affects whether the panel appears and how it labels itself.
panel.title: yam
